# Sunshine Solar Energy

> Lahore-based premium solar installation company delivering residential, commercial and industrial solar systems with net metering, tier-1 equipment and 24/7 monitoring across Punjab, Pakistan.

Sunshine Solar Energy designs and installs grid-tied and hybrid solar systems, handles LESCO/IESCO net metering end-to-end, and provides ongoing monitoring and maintenance. Customers typically cut electricity bills by 70–80%.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, solar savings calculator, services, equipment, projects, FAQs and contact.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we collect, use and protect customer information.
